button.try_hint: Tap to try · Hold 3s to anchor
button.try_hint_aria: Press once to try, hold for three seconds to anchor
button.switch_to_kamae_aria: Switch to Kamae — manage your game library and katas. Keyboard: Ctrl+Tab
button.switch_to_rin_aria: Switch to Rin — face a game presented to you. Keyboard: Ctrl+Tab

status.loading:
Scanning your library.
No data leaves your device.
status.back_focused: Press Escape or B again to close Settings.

tour.sr_hint: Press F1 for help to learn the controls.
tour.spotlight_hint: Press here or F1 for a quick tour
tour.step_title: A game from your library. What you do with it is entirely up to you.
tour.step_prescription: Each game comes with a short message to help you decide. Don't overthink it.
tour.step_try: Press 「TRY」 to launch this game. Hold for 3 seconds to save it for later.
tour.step_not_now: Not feeling it? Press 「Not Now」 and the next one appears.
tour.step_undo: If you pressed Not Now by mistake, Undo brings the game back. One time only.
tour.step_switch_kamae: This button switches to Kamae mode, where you manage your game groups. Click it, press Ctrl+Tab, or RB on your gamepad.
tour.step_kata: Katas are mood-based game groups. Press + to create, x to delete (press twice to confirm). Press F2 or gamepad Y to rename. In Rin, only games from the active kata will appear.
tour.step_search: Search your installed games here and add them to the active kata.
tour.step_search_no_kata: Search your installed games here. Create a kata first to start adding games.
tour.step_list_kata: Your kata games are listed here. To remove: hold for 3 seconds, or press the remove button twice to confirm.
tour.step_list_no_kata: All your installed games are listed here. After creating a kata, you can manage its games in this list.
tour.step_settings_replay: This is Settings. You can replay this tutorial anytime from here. Press F10 on the keyboard or the Menu button on a gamepad to open Settings from any view.
tour.step_switch_rin: Switch back to Rin to start playing. Click this button, press Ctrl+Tab, or LB on your gamepad.

rin.sr_guide: Try this game or skip to the next. Ctrl+Tab to switch to Kamae mode and manage your library.

kamae.desc: Quiet preparation before you face it.
kamae.search_hint: Arrow down to browse results, Escape to clear, Tab to leave.
kamae.remove_help: Requires two Enter presses. Press Escape to cancel.
kamae.remove_too_fast: Too fast. Press Enter again to confirm.
kamae.remove_confirm_aria: Press again to confirm removal. Press Escape to cancel.
kamae.remove_progress_aria: Hold to remove. Release to cancel.
kamae.sr_guide: Organize which games appear. Ctrl+Tab to switch to Rin mode and pick a game to play.

explore.limit_hint: Come back tomorrow to explore more.
explore.exhausted: Nothing new to explore right now.

settings.title: Settings
settings.frozen_guard_desc: Time to rest after each game before you can try the next one.
settings.igdb_desc: Optional. Enter your Twitch Developer credentials to show estimated play time.
settings.igdb_howto: Get your credentials at dev.twitch.tv — create an app, then copy the Client ID and Secret here.
settings.igdb_note: Not all games have duration data. After saving credentials, restart Maida to begin fetching.
settings.credentials_saved: Saved. IGDB data will appear on next restart.

telemetry.title: Anonymous Usage Data
telemetry.desc: Maida sends a single anonymous ping on each launch. No personal data, no game data, no tracking. You can turn this off anytime.
telemetry.privacy: What we collect: a random ID and how many days since install. That's it.

license.title: Maida Plus
license.desc_inactive: Enter your license key to unlock Kata.
license.label: License Key

katas.title: Kata
katas.hint: Choose a kata. Rin will present them to you, one at a time.
katas.controls_hint: Press F2 or controller Y to rename a kata.
katas.locked_desc: Available with Maida Plus. Enter your key in settings.

legal.a11y_commitment: We want Maida to be usable by everyone, regardless of how you interact with your device.
legal.a11y_standards: This application aims to conform to WCAG 2.2 Level AA.
legal.a11y_testing: Tested on Windows with NVDA screen reader, keyboard, and gamepad. On Linux, Orca screen reader support is limited due to WebKitGTK accessibility constraints — buttons are reachable but headings and live announcements may not be exposed.
legal.a11y_feature_keyboard: You can use Maida entirely with a keyboard. Tab moves between items, arrow keys navigate, Enter selects, Escape goes back, and F2 renames a kata.
legal.a11y_feature_gamepad: If you use a gamepad, the D-pad or left stick moves between items, the right stick scrolls long pages, A/B work like Enter/Escape, and LB/RB switch between pages.
legal.a11y_feature_cooldown: You can adjust how long Maida pauses after each TRY, from 5 to 30 seconds.
legal.a11y_feature_sr: Every button and control has a label that screen readers can read aloud.
legal.a11y_feature_focus: The currently selected item is always clearly highlighted so you know where you are.
legal.a11y_feature_motion: Maida is mostly static by design. Where animations exist, they follow your system's reduced motion setting.
legal.a11y_feature_transparency: Maida is available in English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese, including all screen reader text.
legal.a11y_limitation_gamepad: When using a screen reader, focus starts on the game title so you hear the game name first. Tab to the buttons to interact. The lock feature (hold for 3 seconds) requires screen reader focus mode.
legal.a11y_limitation_longpress: Some actions require holding a button down for a few seconds. If you cannot hold, you can press once to see a confirmation prompt, then press again to confirm. This works with all input methods including screen readers.
legal.a11y_limitation_space_key: The Space key on buttons is intentionally blocked to prevent accidental activation. Use Enter for short press; hold Enter for 3 seconds to anchor.
legal.a11y_limitation_settings_in_kamae: Settings is only visible in Kamae mode. From Rin, press F10 or the gamepad Menu button to open Settings. Settings includes a Replay Tutorial option.
legal.a11y_limitation_screen_reader_browse: Some screen reader features (like NVDA Visual Highlight in browse mode) need to be enabled in your screen reader settings, not in Maida. Maida provides its own focus indicator that works regardless of screen reader settings.
legal.a11y_limitation_screen_reader_buffer_stu: Occasionally NVDA's virtual buffer in browse mode desyncs from the actual page, causing arrow keys to stop selecting text or get stuck on a phantom position. Try Insert+F5 to refresh the buffer first; if that does not recover, quit and reopen NVDA. This is a known NVDA behavior, not a Maida issue.
legal.a11y_planned_threshold: The option to change how long you need to hold a button.
legal.a11y_planned_fontsize: The option to make text larger.
legal.a11y_contact: If you encounter accessibility issues, please
legal.privacy_collection: Each time Maida starts, it sends a small, anonymous signal to let us know the app is being used. This contains no personal information, no game data, and no usage details — just a random ID, how many days since you first installed, and the app version. This data is processed by Cloudflare (our infrastructure provider). Maida also checks GitHub for updates on launch. If this policy ever changes, the updated version will be included in the application.
legal.privacy_storage: Your game data, preferences, and session logs are stored locally on your device and are never uploaded to external servers.
legal.privacy_telemetry: You can turn this off at any time in Settings.
legal.terms_your_choice: Maida presents options from your game library. What you do with them is entirely up to you.
legal.terms_no_guarantees: Maida is provided as-is. It may occasionally show unexpected results or miss games. We do our best, but we cannot promise it will always work perfectly.
legal.terms_free: Maida is free. If we ever introduce optional paid features, we will let you know in advance and they will not affect what you already have.
legal.terms_changes: These terms may be updated with new versions. Continued use after an update means you accept the changes.
legal.copyright_text: © 2026 Bright Raven World. All rights reserved.

update.available_alert: Maida {version} is available. Activate the Update button to install.

onboarding.permission_intro: Too many games, can't pick one? Maida shows you one game at a time.
onboarding.permission_detail: Press the button below to scan your installed games. Nothing will be launched.

error.steam_not_found: Steam not detected. You can try again later.

idle.no_games: No games found. Maida is waiting.
